description: Deterministic semantic contract suite for basic named-port legality behavior in sv_stimuli_quality_gate.

cases.name: named_single_port_pass
cases.input: module child(input logic a); endmodule module top; logic sig; child u0(.a(sig)); endmodule

cases.name: named_multi_port_pass
cases.input: module child(input logic a, input logic b, output logic y); endmodule module top; logic x; logic y; logic z; child u0(.a(x), .b(y), .y(z)); endmodule

cases.name: unknown_named_port_fail
cases.input: module child(input logic a); endmodule module top; logic sig; child u0(.bad(sig)); endmodule

cases.name: mixed_named_port_fail
cases.input: module child(input logic a, input logic b); endmodule module top; logic x; logic y; child u0(.a(x), .oops(y)); endmodule

cases.name: wildcard_binding_pass
cases.input: module child(input logic a, input logic b); endmodule module top; logic a; logic b; child u0(.*); endmodule

cases.name: unknown_module_type_ignored_pass
cases.input: module top; logic x; external_mod u0(.a(x)); endmodule

cases.name: second_instance_unknown_named_port_fail
cases.input: module child(input logic clk); endmodule module top; logic clk; child u0(.clk(clk)); child u1(.oops(clk)); endmodule

cases.name: comment_noise_named_port_pass
cases.input:
module child(input logic a); endmodule module top; logic sig; /* comment */ child u0(.a(sig)); // trailing comment
endmodule

cases.name: directive_noise_named_port_pass
cases.input: module child(input logic a); endmodule module top; logic sig; `define TAG 1 child u0(.a(sig)); endmodule

cases.name: preprocessor_conditional_unknown_named_port_fail
cases.input: module child(input logic a); endmodule module top; logic sig; `ifdef BAD child u0(.oops(sig)); `else child u0(.a(sig)); `endif endmodule
